scripts.format: ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm exec -- prettier --write apps packages/contracts tests/integration .github README.md package.json
scripts.format:check: ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm exec -- prettier --check apps packages/contracts tests/integration .github README.md package.json
scripts.typecheck: ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm --workspace @foundation/contracts run typecheck && ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm --workspace @foundation/web run typecheck
scripts.test: ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm --workspace @foundation/contracts run test && ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm --workspace @foundation/web run test
scripts.build: ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm --workspace @foundation/contracts run build && ./scripts/run-with-node.sh npm --workspace @foundation/web run build
